description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and a prominent covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls appear to be constructed from light-colored brick or stone, complemented by wooden accents and trim. The house is surrounded by a neatly landscaped yard with several mature trees and paved walkways leading to the entrances. The front facade features a wide driveway and a sheltered carport area, while the rear includes a smaller patio or terrace. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design reflects a Craftsman architectural style, emphasizing simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a dark gable roof, covered porch, and brick or stone exterior, surrounded by landscaped greenery and paved paths.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, covered porch, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back patio, symmetrical window arrangement, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the carport, side entrance, and extended paved walkway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the porch, secondary entrance, and more of the garden layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
